summary: 2026-07-14 10:12 PDT — The UI changes match the requested layout, preview, copy, session-control, and spinner behavior, but the branch violates the explicit changed-file scope. The test/build gate could not run in the read-only environment because Vite attempted to create a temporary config file.

findings.title: Branch exceeds the approved file scope
findings.claim: AC6 permits only the three client files, the story file, and panel-simplify-and-reorg.design.json. `git diff --name-only main...HEAD` additionally includes this approach-review artifact, so the branch fails an explicit acceptance criterion.
findings.suggestion: Remove this file from the branch, or obtain Thomas's approval to amend AC6 before merging.
